critical_issues: REGISTER broken (500): ORM model uses column 'name' but public.users table has 'display_name' NOT NULL with no default — INSERT fails with NotNullViolation
CREATE PROJECT broken (500): ORM model uses 'owner_id' FK but public.projects table has 'user_id' — INSERT fails with UndefinedColumn
CREATE TASK broken (500): ORM model includes 'description' and 'assignee_id' columns but public.tasks table has neither — INSERT fails with UndefinedColumn
Browser smoke test FAIL: smoke test registration fails because /api/auth/register returns 500, browser_smoke_test.overall = 'error'

step1_servers.detail: Backend healthy at localhost:8000, frontend serving at localhost:3000

step2_auth.detail: Register returns 500 — NotNullViolation on display_name column. Login with seed user (test@fixture.example.com) works. GET /api/auth/me returns user data.

auth_register.error: NotNullViolation: display_name column NOT NULL, ORM sends name only

projects_create.error: UndefinedColumn: ORM uses owner_id but DB has user_id

projects_list.detail: Could not test — requires authenticated user that can create projects

tasks_create.error: UndefinedColumn: ORM includes description column not in DB tasks table

step5_browser.detail: Smoke test failed: registration returns 500, no valid credentials for browser test. Auth step failed.

step6_frontend_pages.detail: All 7 required frontend pages return HTTP 200

tests.name: User registration
tests.detail: POST /api/auth/register returns 500 — NotNullViolation: null value in column 'display_name' of relation 'users'. ORM model maps column as 'name' but DB table has 'display_name' NOT NULL with no default value.

tests.name: Create project
tests.detail: POST /api/projects returns 500 — UndefinedColumn: column 'owner_id' of relation 'projects' does not exist. ORM model uses owner_id FK but DB table has user_id.

tests.name: List projects
tests.detail: Blocked by create failure — cannot verify list without created items

tests.name: Create task
tests.detail: POST /api/tasks returns 500 — UndefinedColumn: column 'description' of relation 'tasks' does not exist. ORM model includes description, assignee_id columns not present in DB tasks table.

tests.name: Browser smoke test
tests.detail: Exit code 1 — browser_smoke_test.overall=error. Auth failed because /api/auth/register returns 500.

users_table.issue: DB has 'display_name' NOT NULL no default, ORM model has 'name'. INSERT fails with NotNullViolation.

projects_table.issue: DB has 'user_id' as FK, ORM model references 'owner_id'. INSERT fails with UndefinedColumn.

tasks_table.issue: DB tasks table has no 'description' or 'assignee_id' columns. ORM includes both. INSERT fails with UndefinedColumn on 'description'.
